# Functions and Methods Module (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/golang/functions-methods`.

## Docs

- [Learning Path](./index.mdx): Module overview, learning roadmap, dependency relationships, reader level guide, and practice project summary.
- [Function Basics](./function-basics.mdx): Function declaration syntax, parameter lists, return value mechanisms, function call flow, basic code examples, and common errors for beginners.
- [Methods System](./methods.mdx): Method declaration syntax, value vs pointer receivers, method values vs expressions, method set rules, interface implementation, and receiver selection decision tree.
- [Advanced Parameters](./advanced-parameters.mdx): Variadic functions, named return values, multiple return value patterns, parameter passing mechanism (value passing detail), and performance considerations.
- [Function Types](./function-types.mdx): Function type definitions, functions as variables, functions as parameters, functions as return values, higher-order function patterns, and practical applications.
- [Closures](./closures.mdx): Anonymous function syntax, closure principles, variable capture mechanism, closure pitfalls (loop variable issues), Go 1.22+ changes, memory management considerations, and practical examples.
- [Defer Mechanism](./defer.mdx): Defer basic syntax, LIFO execution order, parameter evaluation timing, interaction with named return values, resource cleanup patterns, panic recovery, and common pitfalls.
- [Error Handling](./panic-recover.mdx): Go error handling philosophy, multiple return value error patterns, error wrapping and unwrapping, panic trigger conditions, recover usage timing, custom error types, and best practices.
- [Best Practices](./best-practices.mdx): Function design principles, naming conventions, error handling patterns, performance optimization techniques, testability design, common anti-patterns, and code review checklist.
- [Module Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for functions-methods subdirectory.
